name: Huang Zhong

skills.name: Gunner's Spirit
skills.description: Basic Attacks increase attack and Critical Rate

skills.name: Unleash Your Potential
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and permanently increased attack. Cast while in Cannon form to immediately exit the state.

skills.name: Lay the Mines
skills.description: Places a trap in the target area. The trap grants vision of enemies that touchit, while also inflicting damage, slow, and Sunder on them and granting Huang Zhong a shield.

skills.name: Bring out the Artillery
skills.description: Huang Zhong dashes for a certain distance and deploys a turret while refreshing his Skill 1. He becomes immobile, gains range and Physical and Magical Defense Basic Attacks deal area damage.The turret will be deactivated after a certain number of Basic Attacks.

tips: Huang Zhong is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.2% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Sparkforged Dagger → Boots of Dexterity → Eternity Blade → Daybreaker's Virtue → Starbreaker.
Run Red for stats that match Huang Zhong's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Unleash Your Potential → Lay the Mines → Bring out the Artillery → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Huang Zhong excels into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.
Huang Zhong sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Huang Zhong good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong is Tier B Marksman with 51.2% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Huang Zhong build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Daybreaker's Virtue, Starbreaker. Run Red arcana with Haste & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Huang Zhong?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur into Huang Zhong. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Huang Zhong completes core items. Huang Zhong struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Huang Zhong counter?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong is strong into Xuance, Mai Shiranui, Jing according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Huang Zhong when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Huang Zhong good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong sits at Tier B globally (51.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Huang Zhong play?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Huang Zhong?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Red arcana. Battle spell: Haste & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Huang Zhong or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Huang Zhong vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Huang Zhong has +1.9% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Huang Zhong when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Huang Zhong?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Marksman picks unless targeting a one-trick.
